title: Watch: US destroys multiple Iranian minelayers in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: US forces have destroyed multiple Iranian vessels suspected of laying naval mines near the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil transit route. President Trump issued a stern warning to Tehran, demanding immediate removal of any deployed mines or facing unprecedented military consequences. This action follows intelligence reports suggesting Iran's intent to disrupt shipping in the vital waterway.
